Overview: Bond keeps you connected to family and friends by sharing everyone's real-time whereabouts on an interactive map. You can see where people are and which direction they're moving, and receive notifications when family and friends arrive or leave their destination.
Key Features: Keep track of loved ones; Real-time location mapping; Arrival/Departure notifications

Overview: Bond monitors your location until confirming you've safely arrived at your destination. If you don't arrive within your ETA or deviate from your route, Bond checks in and escalates to your emergency contact if needed. If you seem unsafe, Bond coordinates with first responders and sends them your photo and GPS coordinates.
Key Features: Bond monitors your journey; Confirms safe arrival; Connect with an Agent at any time; Coordinates first responders if needed

Overview: Press and hold the Ready An Agent button to put a Personal Security Agent on standby at the Command Center. When you release the button, you're connected with an Agent who can assist you. If you don't respond, Bond coordinates with the authorities.
Key Features: Press and hold anywhere on screen; Use when uncomfortable but not ready to speak; Conceal phone to avoid drawing attention

Overview: Tap Video Monitor Me and a Personal Security Agent is instantly by your side via live video, monitoring you and your surroundings. Keep the Agent with you until you feel safe. If the situation escalates, the Agent will advise you or coordinate with authorities.
Key Features: Live video monitoring; Agent virtually accompanies you; Immediate assessment of your situation and surroundings

Overview: With a tap, Bond Personal Security Agents join you via video, find a nearby safe location, and dispatch a rideshare car to pick you up — no rideshare account required. Bond will even help the driver find you if you're on the move.
Key Features: Dispatches a nearby car to a safer location; No ridesharing account required; Works even if you're on the move

Overview: Hold for 3 seconds to activate Siren — bright flashing lights and loud noise alert bystanders and deter threats. With Bond Premium, an Agent is automatically connected when the countdown finishes and will coordinate with authorities if necessary. You can also connect with an Agent or cancel at any time.
Key Features: Personal alarm with lights and sound; Alerts bystanders; Bond Premium auto-connects an Agent and coordinates authorities
